properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Every tribe will see Your glory Every nation bow before You All our treasure turned to ashes In the light of You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: As we're singing Holy is the Lord Almighty Only You are worthy Worthy of it all

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Every tribe will see Your glory Every nation bow before You, oooh All our treasure turned to ashes In the light of You, oh

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Praise and glory Honor and strength Unto our God Unto our God Matchless, endless Love unrestrained This is our God Every tribe sing Praise and glory Honor and strength Unto our God Unto our God Matchless, endless Love unrestrained This is our God Every tribe sing

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Ayo-ayo-ayo-waa Ayo-ayo-ayo-waa We sing Ayo-ayo-ayo-waa Ayo-ayo-ayo-waa Oh-ohh

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There is no one like our God (No one) There is no one like our God There is no one like our God There is no one like our God Wala kang katulad O Diyos Wala kang katulad O Diyos No hay nadie como nuestro Dios No hay nadie como nuestro Dios There is no one like our God (We sing) There is no one like our God There is no one like our God There is no one like our God

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Praise and glory Honor and strength Unto our God Unto our God You're matchless, endless Love unrestrained This is our God Every tribe sing Praise and glory Honor and strength Unto our God Unto our God You're matchless, endless Love unrestrained This is our God This is our God

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Ayo-ayo-ayo-waa Ayo-ayo-ayo-waa Ayo-ayo-ayo-waa Ayo-ayo-ayo-waa Ayo-ayo-ayo-waa Ayo-ayo-ayo-waa Ayo-ayo-ayo-waa Ayo-ayo-ayo-waa
